docket_entries.description: MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO REQUEST, DEMAND INSPECTION, PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION & TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIF (FOREFEITURE) HEARING SET FOR JAN-26-2005 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT 612

DISCOVERY, 612, PRESENT: PAMELA UNDERWOOD, ASST. DISTRICT ATTORNEY FOR PETITIONER/MOVING PARTY, PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. PETITIONER'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, JUDICIAL FORM INTERROGATORIES, FIRST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR AS THE MOTION WAS NOT TIMELY NOTICED. C.C.P. SECTION 1005, AS AMENDED AND EFFECTIVE JANUARY 1, 2005, REQUIRES THAT MOTIONS BE SERVED AND FILED 16 COURT DAYS PRIOR TO THE HEARING WITH FIVE DAYS ADDED IF SERVED BY MAIL. AS THIS MOTION WAS FILED ON JANUARY 4, 2005, THE NEW PROVISIONS APPLY. THE FIRST DAY THIS MOTION COULD BE HEARD WOULD BE JANUARY 31, 2005. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
